response.overview: This audacious comedy (or perhaps superhero film?) was shot on the day of the actual university entrance ceremony, partly as a way of promoting the Film Research Club. Within the club itself, reactions were sharply divided between those who loved it and those who were simply dumbfounded, making it one of the group’s more controversial productions.
response.tagline: There are no such things as dreams or hope!
response.title: 陰気ん仮面の崩壊
